isolation_opt_out_reason: Single-feature post-merge closure in chore/v7-9-1-promotion-close — the unified case study + comprehensive doc sweep shipped via PR #629 already completed FT2-side T2 + T7-T10; cross-repo T3/T4/T5/T6 closed via fitme-story PRs #171 + #173 + #177. Closure PR distinct from #629 to keep the merge PR (#629) free of recursive state.json edits.
primary_metric: Single unified Phase-promotion case study + showcase covering all 8 ships of the v7.9.1 build window (2026-06-04), preserving per-feature case studies (FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS gate requirement) as the depth layer
success_metrics: docs/case-studies/framework-v7-9-1-promotion-case-study.md exists with §0-§99 sections, T1/T2/T3 tier tags, kill_criteria_resolution, related_prs covering #620-#628 (T1, measured by file presence + grep for required sections)
Cross-references each of the 8 per-feature case studies by name in §3 (T1, grep)
Quantitative roll-up table in §4 covers gate counts, CI workflow counts, W-pattern counts, dev-env R-item open counts (T1)
Risk register in §99.3 covers each of the calendar-anchored T+7d and T+14d verifications (T1)
kill_criteria: Unified case study omits or contradicts a per-feature case study — would create a documentation-debt mismatch
Quantitative roll-up table contains inaccurate gate or workflow counts — would mislead operators
Future operator can't navigate from unified case study to per-feature depth — defeats the Option D 'panoramic + depth' design
kill_criteria_resolution: All 3 mitigated. (1) §3 explicitly lists each per-feature CS by filename and key number, with cross-references — verified by ls of docs/case-studies/. (2) §4 numbers cited from actual surfaces: gate counts from scripts/check-state-schema.py; workflow counts from .github/workflows/ ls; W-pattern count from observed-patterns.md tail; R-item open count from dev-env-master-plan R-table. (3) Every per-feature CS is linked in §3 via clickable markdown; the unified CS is positioned in CLAUDE.md + dev-guide as the 'entry point' with per-feature CS as depth.
scope_summary: Unified Phase-promotion case study + fitme-story showcase covering the v7.9.1 single-day build window (2026-06-04, 8 ships, 14 PRs). Synthesizes F16/F17/F2/Track B (predecessors) + F-LAUNCHD-DRIFT-EXTENSION (b)+(c)+(a) + observed-patterns W29-W32 batch + F-PHASE-E-ADOPTION-FREEZE-DISCIPLINE + R9 Track B + dev-env R11+R13+R14+R17+R18 + F-DEPLOYED-URL-PROBE. Preserves all per-feature case studies (8 total — required by FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS gate). Cross-cutting themes: silent-pass closures (5 of 8 ships); post-Phase-E cadence (0 new gates, 14 feature-branch PRs); cascading rebase rhythm. Quantitative roll-up shows: 0 new enforcement gates, +6 CI workflows (coverage/gitleaks/pip-audit/SBOM/commitlint/shellcheck), W1-W28 → W1-W32, FT2 dev-env open items 7 → 0.
